channel.title: OS on Shivanand Velmurugan — Product leader. Systems thinker.
channel.description: Recent content in OS on Shivanand Velmurugan — Product leader. Systems thinker.

item.title: I'm getting an os upgrade for 10 bucks!
item.description:
With Snow Leopard, Apple has the first time done something that has made me go wow! An almost free OS upgrade. This kinda beats the crap out of paying a couple hundred for Win7.

[Posted via email from posterous - service no longer available]
